nissan|altima||.basis: Estimate for a 5-8 year old Nissan Altima with average mileage and condition in the Dallas, TX used market.

ford|f-150|2009|2014.basis: Typical used-market range for a 2009-2014 Ford F-150 with average mileage and condition in the Dallas, TX market, varying by trim, engine, and drivetrain.

freightliner|cascadia||.basis: Approximate Dallas used-market range for a 5-8 year old Freightliner Cascadia sleeper tractor with typical mileage (~500k-700k miles) in average condition.

tesla|model y|2020|2024.basis: Estimate based on typical Dallas used-market values for 2020-2024 Model Y across model years, mileage, and trims.

chrysler|pacifica||.basis: Typical Dallas used-market range for a 5-8 year old Chrysler Pacifica with average mileage and condition, varying by trim and hybrid vs gas.

tesla|cybertruck|2024|2025.basis: Estimate based on Cybertruck trims depreciating notably from original MSRPs of ~$80K-$100K amid weak used demand in the Dallas market.
